examples: I say, John, I see the smoke of the redskin camp!
"We are putting the redskin on the rock," Smee called out.
Redskin Joe sprang to his feet, his eyes flaming with fury, snatched up Potter's knife, and went creeping, cat-like, about the struggling men, seeking for an opportunity.
The hush in FedEx Stadium where the Redskin faithful held their collective breaths told you all you need to know.
